question.sql:
SELECT l.drive_family, SUM(e.units_completed) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines l
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events e ON l.line_id = e.work_order_id
WHERE l.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY l.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(se.units_completed) AS total_patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events se ON pl.line_id = se.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
ORDER BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT seagate_production_lines.drive_family, COUNT(seagate_production_events.event_id) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events ON seagate_production_lines.line_id = seagate_production_events.work_order_id
WHERE seagate_production_lines.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY seagate_production_lines.drive_family
LIMIT 100

paraphrase.sql:
SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS finished_patties_count
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  seagate_production_lines.drive_family,
  COALESCE(SUM(seagate_production_events.units_completed), 0) AS finished_patties_from_idle_lines
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines
LEFT JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events
  ON seagate_production_lines.line_id = seagate_production_events.work_order_id
WHERE seagate_production_lines.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY seagate_production_lines.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT pl.drive_family AS drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS finished_patties_count
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

question.sql:
SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS total_patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
ORDER BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 500

SELECT pl.drive_family AS drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS total_patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pe.line_id = pl.line_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
ORDER BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  spl.drive_family AS "Drive Family",
  COUNT(spe.units_completed) AS "Patties Plated"
FROM
  seagate_core.seagate_production_lines spl
JOIN
  seagate_ops.seagate_production_events spe ON spl.line_id = spe.work_order_id
WHERE
  spl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY
  spl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT p.drive_family, SUM(e.units_completed) AS finished_patties_count
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines p
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events e ON p.line_id = e.work_order_id
WHERE p.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY p.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS finished_patties_count
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS finished_patties_count
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

question.sql:
SELECT
  (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sqt.result = 'PASS' AND sqt.garnish_defect = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*)) AS golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests AS sqt
  JOIN seagate_core.seagate_production_lines AS spl ON sqt.work_order_id = spl.line_id
  JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus AS sds ON spl.drive_family = sds.drive_family
WHERE
  sds.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND sqt.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND sqt.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'Golden Yield' THEN 1 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests q
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus s ON q.work_order_id = s.sku_id
WHERE s.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND q.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND q.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN q.result = 'Golden Yield' THEN 1 END)::FLOAT / COUNT(*) AS golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests q
JOIN
  seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus s ON q.work_order_id = s.sku_id
WHERE
  s.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND q.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND q.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1

paraphrase.sql:
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(pe.units_completed, 0))::FLOAT / SUM(COALESCE(pe.units_completed, 0) + COALESCE(pe.units_reworked, 0) + COALESCE(pe.units_scrapped, 0)) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus sku
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON sku.sku_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE sku.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND pe.event_date >= '2025-10-01'::DATE
  AND pe.event_date < '2026-01-01'::DATE
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(units_completed) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(units_scrapped), 0), 0) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_production_events AS spe
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus AS sds ON spe.work_order_id = sds.sku_id
WHERE sds.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND spe.event_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND spe.event_date < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  SUM(seagate_production_events.units_completed) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(seagate_production_events.units_scrapped + seagate_production_events.units_reworked), 0) AS golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_production_events
JOIN
  seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus
ON
  seagate_production_events.work_order_id = seagate_drive_skus.sku_id
WHERE
  seagate_drive_skus.drive_family LIKE 'Vantage%'
  AND seagate_production_events.event_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND seagate_production_events.event_date < '20

question.sql:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'Golden Yield' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / COUNT(*) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus ON seagate_quality_tests.work_order_id = seagate_drive_skus.sku_id
WHERE seagate_drive_skus.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND seagate_quality_tests.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND seagate_quality_tests.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN sqt.result = 'Golden Yield' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / COUNT(*) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests sqt
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus sds ON sqt.work_order_id = sds.sku_id
WHERE sds.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND sqt.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND sqt.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'Pass' AND garnish_defect = FALSE THEN 1 END) = 0
       THEN NULL
       ELSE (COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'Pass' AND garnish_defect = FALSE THEN 1 END)::DECIMAL / COUNT(*)) * 100
  END AS golden_yield_percentage
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests qt
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_work_orders wo ON qt.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus ds ON wo.sku_id = ds.sku_id
WHERE ds.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND qt.tested_at >= '2

paraphrase.sql:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.drive_family = 'Vantage' THEN (e.units_completed - COALESCE(e.units_reworked, 0) - COALESCE(e.units_scrapped, 0)) ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT /
  NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.drive_family = 'Vantage' THEN e.units_completed ELSE 0 END), 0) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_production_events e
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus d ON e.work_order_id = d.sku_id
WHERE e.event_date >= '2025-10-01' AND e.event_date < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT SUM((units_completed - units_reworked - units_scrapped) / NULLIF(units_completed, 0)) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_production_events AS pe
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus AS sku ON pe.work_order_id = sku.sku_id
WHERE sku.drive_family ILIKE 'Vantage%'
  AND pe.event_date >= '2025-10-01' AND pe.event_date < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  (SUM(1.0 * (units_completed - units_reworked - units_scrapped)) / SUM(units_completed)) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_production_events AS prod
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus AS skus ON prod.work_order_id = skus.sku_id
WHERE skus.drive_family LIKE 'Vantage%' -- Vantage-family drives
  AND prod.event_date >= '2025-10-01' AND prod.event_date < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000
